projects.title: BakeFlow: Bakery App
projects.bodyText:
- Platform focused on bakery management.
- Organized order handling and production workflow.

projects.title: Condominio Leads: Condo Services Hub
projects.bodyText:
- Digital hub to connect services and solutions for condominiums.
- Focused on lead generation and management for the condo market.

projects.title: Mirach: Time Series Forecasting System
projects.bodyText:
- SaaS platform for time series forecasting.
- Supports multiple algorithms such as ARIMA, ETS, Prophet, LSTM and regression models.

projects.title: ShowIn: Social Network for Musicians
projects.bodyText:
- Social platform focused on opportunities in the music market.
- Experience designed for musician networking.

projects.title: Notebook Guide: Laptop Selection Website
projects.bodyText:
- Website that helps users choose the ideal laptop.
- Content focused on comparison and buying decisions.
